__schema0.title: Reference Object
__schema0.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

examples.description: A user is a type of person.
A pet is a type of animal.
A pet is a type of animal.

__schema1.title: Reference
__schema1.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

__schema5.title: summary
__schema5.description: A short summary which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema6.title: description
__schema6.description: A description which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema9.title: name
__schema9.description: The name of the parameter. Case-sensitive.

__schema10.title: in
__schema10.description: Location of the parameter. 'path' parameters must have required=true.

__schema11.title: description
__schema11.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema16.description: For query parameters only. Allows empty values (?param=).
__schema16.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema18.title: style
__schema18.description: Serialization style. Defaults vary by 'in': query/cookie='form', path/header='simple'.

__schema19.title: explode
__schema19.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema20.description: For query parameters. When true, allows reserved characters without encoding.
__schema20.title: allowReserved

__schema23.title: Schema Object
__schema23.description: A Schema Object defines the shape of a JSON value.

__schema24.title: String Object
__schema24.description: A String Object defines the shape of a string value.

__schema25.title: title
__schema25.description: A title for the schema, used for documentation.

__schema26.title: description
__schema26.description: A description of the schema. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema27.title: default
__schema27.description: The default value for this schema.

__schema28.title: example
__schema28.description: An example value for this schema.

__schema31.title: enum
__schema31.description: An array of valid values for this schema.

__schema33.title: const
__schema33.description: A constant value that this schema must match.

__schema35.title: Discriminator
__schema35.description: When request bodies or response payloads may be one of a number of different schemas, a discriminator object can be used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.

__schema36.title: propertyName
__schema36.description: The name of the property in the payload that will hold the discriminator value.

__schema37.title: mapping
__schema37.description: An object to hold mappings between payload values and schema names or references.

__schema40.title: defaultMapping
__schema40.description: The default mapping to use when no matching discriminator value is found.

__schema43.title: XML
__schema43.description: A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.

__schema44.title: name
__schema44.description: Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.

__schema45.title: namespace
__schema45.description: The URI of the namespace definition.

__schema46.title: prefix
__schema46.description: The prefix to be used for the name.

__schema47.description: Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
__schema47.title: attribute

__schema49.description: May be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped or not.
__schema49.title: wrapped

__schema53.title: ExternalDocumentation
__schema53.description: Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.

__schema54.title: description
__schema54.description: A short description of the target documentation.

__schema55.title: url
__schema55.description: The URL for the target documentation.

__schema57.title: readOnly
__schema57.description: When true, the property is only returned in responses, not accepted in requests.

__schema58.title: writeOnly
__schema58.description: When true, the property is only accepted in requests, not returned in responses.

__schema59.title: deprecated
__schema59.description: When true, indicates this schema is deprecated and should be avoided.

__schema61.title: format
__schema61.description: Semantic format hint for string values. Common formats: date-time, email, uuid, uri, hostname, ipv4, byte, binary.

__schema62.title: Pattern
__schema62.description: A regular expression pattern the string must match.

__schema68.title: Number Object
__schema68.description: A Number Object defines the shape of a number value.

__schema70.title: format
__schema70.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema71.title: multipleOf
__schema71.description: Require the number to be a multiple of this value.

__schema73.title: minimum
__schema73.description: Inclusive lower bound for the number.

__schema75.title: maximum
__schema75.description: Inclusive upper bound for the number.

__schema77.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema77.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema79.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema79.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema81.title: Integer Object
__schema81.description: An Integer Object defines the shape of an integer value.

__schema83.title: format
__schema83.description: Integer size format. Use 'int32' for signed 32-bit (-2B to 2B) or 'int64' for signed 64-bit integers.

__schema84.title: multipleOf
__schema84.description: Require the integer to be a multiple of this value.

__schema86.title: minimum
__schema86.description: Inclusive lower bound for the integer.

__schema88.title: maximum
__schema88.description: Inclusive upper bound for the integer.

__schema90.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema90.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema92.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema92.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema94.title: Boolean Object
__schema94.description: A Boolean Object defines the shape of a boolean value.

__schema96.title: Null Object
__schema96.description: A Null Object defines the shape of a null value.

__schema98.title: Array Object
__schema98.description: An Array Object defines the shape of an array value.

__schema102.title: prefixItems
__schema102.description: Tuple validation: schemas for items by index (array position).

__schema104.title: contains
__schema104.description: Require the array to contain at least one item matching this subschema.

__schema116.title: Object Object
__schema116.description: An Object Object defines the shape of an object value.

__schema140.title: Composition Schema
__schema140.description: A schema using composition keywords (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not, if/then/else) without a type constraint.

__schema141.title: allOf
__schema141.description: Require the instance to validate against all subschemas.

__schema143.title: anyOf
__schema143.description: Require the instance to validate against at least one subschema.

__schema145.title: oneOf
__schema145.description: Require the instance to validate against exactly one subschema.

__schema147.title: not
__schema147.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema149.title: if
__schema149.description: Conditional validation: if the instance matches this schema, apply then; otherwise apply else.

__schema153.title: else
__schema153.description: Subschema applied when if does not match.

__schema156.title: examples
__schema156.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema163.title: externalValue
__schema163.description: A URL that points to the literal example.

__schema164.title: dataValue
__schema164.description: The data value of the example before serialization. Mutually exclusive with value and externalValue.

__schema165.title: serializedValue
__schema165.description: The serialized representation of the example. Mutually exclusive with value and externalValue.

__schema167.title: content
__schema167.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema169.title: MediaType
__schema169.description: Each Media Type Object provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.

__schema177.title: Encoding
__schema177.description: A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.

__schema178.title: contentType
__schema178.description: The Content-Type for encoding a specific property.

__schema181.title: Header
__schema181.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema182.title: Header
__schema182.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema183.title: description
__schema183.description: A brief description of the parameter.

__schema184.description: Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
__schema184.title: required

__schema186.description: Specifies that a parameter is deprecated.
__schema186.title: deprecated

__schema188.description: Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
__schema188.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema190.title: style
__schema190.description: Describes how the parameter value will be serialized.

__schema214.title: itemSchema
__schema214.description: Schema for individual items in streaming responses.

__schema215.title: itemEncoding
__schema215.description: Encoding for individual items in streaming responses.
